migrationFlow.step: Inventory v2 assets and classify by migration complexity.
Run compatibility scanner and produce per-asset remediation tasks.
Apply migration transformers with dry-run and diff evidence.
Execute validation, replay, context-integrity, and security suites.
Promote by environment profile with rollback checkpoints.

compatibilityPolicy.policy: Maintain v2 adapter layer for one major cycle.
Emit deterministic deprecation warnings with migration hints.
Block release when critical compatibility regressions exist.

releaseGates.gate: prompt lint and context integrity tests green

postRelease.task: Monitor anomaly streams and policy violation trends.
Track migration friction and publish targeted patch plan.
Continuously refine prompt templates and handoff contracts from incident learnings.
